targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) as total FROM dojo_finding WHERE severity IN ('High', 'Critical') AND active = true AND duplicate = false;
SELECT severity, count(*) as total FROM dojo_finding WHERE active = true AND duplicate = false GROUP BY severity;

SELECT f.title AS "Finding", f.severity AS "Severity", f.component_name AS "Component", t.title AS "Test", e.name AS "Engagement", CASE WHEN f.false_p = true THEN 'False Positive' WHEN f.risk_accepted = true THEN 'Accepted' ELSE 'Active' END AS "Status", f.date AS "Date" FROM dojo_finding f JOIN dojo_test t ON f.test_id = t.id JOIN dojo_engagement e ON t.engagement_id = e.id WHERE f.active = true ORDER BY f.date DESC;
